name: lyrics_sync
description: Sync lyrics text to audio using Whisper word timestamps on clean vocals (output of stem_separation). Whisper detects the lyrics window automatically then provides word-level timestamps. Lyrics are matched to Whisper words via SequenceMatcher; unmatched words are interpolated between anchors. Outputs a caption track JSON grouped by lyric phrase — ready to use as project.json captions or as overlay entries via lyric-phrase.jsx. For best results, pass the vocals stem from stem_separation rather than the full mix.

input.description: Vocals WAV from stem_separation (--stems vocals), or any audio/video file

output.description: Caption track JSON: { segments: [{ text, start, end, words: [{word, start, end}] }], audioInPoint: number }

params.name: lyrics
params.description: Path to lyrics text file. One phrase per line. Blank lines ignored.

params.name: model
params.description: Whisper model. medium.en gives more word matches and tighter timestamps. base.en is faster.

params.name: start
params.description: Optional: override start time in seconds (skips auto-detection). Use when auto-detection is off.

params.name: end
params.description: Optional: override end time in seconds (skips auto-detection).
